photographer: Dr. Thomas G. Barnes, U.S. Fish and Wildlife Service
creditLine: Dr. Thomas G. Barnes, U.S. Fish and Wildlife Service
caption: Close-up of a black-eyed Susan flower and bud.
publicDomainBasis: Wikimedia Commons file page states the work was released into the public domain by Dr. Thomas G. Barnes, U.S. Fish and Wildlife Service, for worldwide reuse.
reviewNotes: Chosen as the live bundled image because the flower and bud are centered and substantially better for plant identification than the earlier garden-scene image.

caption: Black-eyed Susan planting in a USDA ARS pollinator garden.
publicDomainBasis: Hosted on an official USDA ARS image page and reviewed under USDA policy stating most USDA website materials are public domain unless otherwise noted.
reviewNotes: Legally usable backup candidate, but not preferred for the live detail page because the composition includes a person and does not center the plant clearly enough for identification.

caption: Black-eyed Susan blooming in the Alabama ES garden.
publicDomainBasis: USFWS media page explicitly labels the asset as Public Domain.
reviewNotes: Preferred government-source candidate. Safe to bundle locally after manual download and final metadata check.

caption: Black-eyed Susan in bloom at Lake Woodruff National Wildlife Refuge in Florida.
publicDomainBasis: USFWS media page explicitly labels the asset as Public Domain.
reviewNotes: Preferred government-source candidate. Safe to bundle locally after manual download and final metadata check.

caption: Butterfly milkweed with bright orange flower clusters.
publicDomainBasis: USFWS media page explicitly labels the asset as Public Domain.
reviewNotes: Bundled as the primary offline hero image because the bloom color and structure are clear at field-guide scale.

caption: Cardinal flower in bloom with a close view of the scarlet spike.
publicDomainBasis: USFWS media page explicitly labels the asset as Public Domain.
reviewNotes: Bundled as the primary offline hero image because the flower color and spike structure are distinctive and readable.

caption: Common milkweed blooming at Waubay National Wildlife Refuge.
publicDomainBasis: USFWS media page explicitly labels the asset as Public Domain.
reviewNotes: Bundled as the primary offline hero image because it shows both habit and flower cluster structure well.

caption: Wild bergamot with shaggy lavender flower heads.
publicDomainBasis: USFWS media page explicitly labels the asset as Public Domain.
reviewNotes: Bundled as the primary offline hero image because it centers the flower cluster and stem structure clearly for field recognition.

caption: Great blue lobelia with large blue flowers in a late-summer spike.
publicDomainBasis: USFWS media page explicitly labels the asset as Public Domain.
reviewNotes: Bundled as the primary offline hero image because the flower color and spike form remain legible after optimization.

caption: Mayapple colony in bloom with umbrella-like leaves.
publicDomainBasis: USFWS media page explicitly labels the asset as Public Domain.
reviewNotes: Bundled as the primary offline hero image because the leaf architecture reads well even at card scale.

caption: Bloodroot with a white spring flower and fresh leaf.
publicDomainBasis: USFWS media page explicitly labels the asset as Public Domain.
reviewNotes: Bundled as the primary offline hero image because it shows the early-spring flower and unfolding leaf together.

caption: Jack-in-the-pulpit showing the hooded spathe above woodland leaves.
publicDomainBasis: USFWS media page explicitly labels the asset as Public Domain.
reviewNotes: Bundled as the primary offline hero image because the hooded flower structure is centered and easy to read.

caption: New England aster in bloom with purple rays and yellow centers.
publicDomainBasis: USFWS media page explicitly labels the asset as Public Domain.
reviewNotes: Bundled as the primary offline hero image because the flower form and fall color remain distinct at mobile size.

caption: Obedient plant with pink-purple flowers arranged along an upright spike.
publicDomainBasis: USFWS media page explicitly labels the asset as Public Domain.
reviewNotes: Bundled as the primary offline hero image because the spike shape and mint-family flower arrangement read clearly.

caption: Wild geranium with purple petals and green leaves.
publicDomainBasis: USFWS media page explicitly labels the asset as Public Domain.
reviewNotes: Bundled as the primary offline hero image because the flower form is centered and clear.

caption: Virginia bluebells in bloom on a spring woodland plant.
publicDomainBasis: USFWS media page explicitly labels the asset as Public Domain.
reviewNotes: Bundled as the primary offline hero image because the cluster shape and bloom color are easy to read.

caption: Wild columbine with red-and-yellow pendant flowers.
publicDomainBasis: USFWS media page explicitly labels the asset as Public Domain.
reviewNotes: Bundled as the primary offline hero image because it shows the distinctive spurred flower shape clearly.

caption: Swamp milkweed with pink flower clusters in wetland habitat.
publicDomainBasis: USFWS media page explicitly labels the asset as Public Domain.
reviewNotes: Bundled as the primary offline hero image because the flower cluster color and form are easy to distinguish.

caption: Purple coneflower bloom on an official USFWS species media page.
publicDomainBasis: USFWS media page explicitly labels the asset as Public Domain.
reviewNotes: Bundled as the primary offline hero image because the drooping rays and cone are clearly visible.

caption: Blue vervain photographed at Neal Smith National Wildlife Refuge.
publicDomainBasis: USFWS media page explicitly labels the asset as Public Domain.
reviewNotes: Bundled as the primary offline hero image because the flowering spikes remain legible after local optimization.

caption: Prairie blazingstar blooming on prairie habitat.
publicDomainBasis: USFWS media page explicitly labels the asset as Public Domain.
reviewNotes: Bundled as the primary offline hero image because the bloom spike reads well and the species page is exact.

caption: Blue flag iris (Iris virginica var. shrevei) in bloom.
publicDomainBasis: N/A — CC-BY-SA license; commercially usable with attribution required.
reviewNotes: Sourced from Wikimedia Commons. Photographer credit requires verification on the file page before shipping.

caption: Prairie dock showing the towering flower stalk and large basal leaves.
publicDomainBasis: N/A — CC-BY or CC-BY-SA license; commercially usable with attribution.
reviewNotes: Flickr-sourced image mirrored to Wikimedia Commons. Confirm exact license and photographer on file page.

caption: Golden Alexanders (Zizia aurea) with yellow umbel flowers.
publicDomainBasis: N/A — CC-BY-SA 4.0. Kenraiz consistently publishes botanical photography under CC-BY-SA 4.0 on Wikimedia Commons.
reviewNotes: Kenraiz kz-series files are a well-known and legally consistent CC-BY-SA 4.0 source for botanical photography.

caption: Common boneset (Eupatorium perfoliatum) with white flower clusters.
publicDomainBasis: N/A — CC-BY-SA 4.0 by Kenraiz.
reviewNotes: Kenraiz kz-series; CC-BY-SA 4.0 confirmed by author publishing pattern.

caption: Joe-Pye weed (Eutrochium sp.) with mauve flower clusters.
publicDomainBasis: N/A — CC-BY-SA 4.0 by Kenraiz.
reviewNotes: File depicts Eutrochium purpureum; app plant is E. maculatum — visually near-identical for field ID. Acceptable for hero use.

caption: Stiff goldenrod (Solidago rigida) in bloom.
publicDomainBasis: N/A — CC-BY or CC-BY-SA license; commercially usable with attribution.
reviewNotes: Flickr-sourced image mirrored to Wikimedia Commons. Confirm exact license and photographer on file page.

caption: Cup plant (Silphium perfoliatum) showing yellow flowers and paired leaf cups.
publicDomainBasis: N/A — CC-BY-SA 4.0 by Kenraiz.
reviewNotes: Kenraiz kz-series; CC-BY-SA 4.0 confirmed by author publishing pattern.

caption: Compass plant (Silphium laciniatum) with deeply lobed basal leaves and yellow flowers.
publicDomainBasis: N/A — CC-BY-SA 4.0 by Kenraiz.
reviewNotes: Kenraiz kz-series; CC-BY-SA 4.0 confirmed by author publishing pattern.

caption: Rattlesnake master (Eryngium yuccifolium) with globe-shaped flower heads and yucca-like leaves.
publicDomainBasis: N/A — CC-BY-SA 4.0 by Kenraiz.
reviewNotes: Kenraiz kz-series; CC-BY-SA 4.0 confirmed by author publishing pattern.

caption: Culver's root (Veronicastrum virginicum) with tall white flower spikes.
publicDomainBasis: N/A — CC-BY-SA 4.0 by Kenraiz.
reviewNotes: Kenraiz kz-series; CC-BY-SA 4.0 confirmed by author publishing pattern.

caption: Ironweed (Vernonia fasciculata) with deep purple flower clusters.
publicDomainBasis: N/A — CC-BY-SA 4.0 by Kenraiz.
reviewNotes: Photographed at Chicago Botanic Garden. Kenraiz kz-series; CC-BY-SA 4.0 confirmed.

caption: Red osier dogwood (Cornus sericea) showing white flower clusters.
publicDomainBasis: N/A — CC-BY-SA license; commercially usable with attribution.
reviewNotes: Photographer credit requires verification on the file page before shipping.

caption: Virginia creeper (Parthenocissus quinquefolia) climbing a pin oak showing five-leaflet pattern.
publicDomainBasis: N/A — CC-BY-SA license; commercially usable with attribution.
reviewNotes: Photographer credit requires verification on the file page before shipping.
